note: Initialized EpiphanyAgent as a repo-local experiment with canonical map, disposable scratch, distilled evidence, and re-entry handoff surfaces.

Mapped vendored Codex dataflow: CLI/TUI/app-server clients feed codex-core session, prompt/tool execution, rollout persistence, SQLite metadata, compaction, watcher/diff side channels, and mostly transcript-shaped tool output. Epiphany must add typed repo-understanding above that substrate rather than relying on transcript osmosis.

Audited third-party OpenCodex-style candidates and rejected them as primary GUI/fork bases: terminal-only, stale/aspirational, inconsistent wrappers, or built around non-Codex cores. Decision: own the Codex fork seam directly.

Epiphany is a fork-level modeling architecture, not a collaboration preset. Structured thread state is the primary artifact; chat is one client; GUI/client surfaces may reflect and steer typed state but must not manufacture canonical understanding.

Phase 1 landed: EpiphanyThreadState and RolloutItem::EpiphanyState persist in session and rollout state, survive resume/rollback/compaction reconstruction, and tolerate the new rollout variant across protocol/state/app-server readers.

Phase 2 landed: a bounded EpiphanyStateInstructions developer fragment renders typed state into initial context when state exists, omits it when absent, and survives resume through prompt-facing tests and snapshots.

Phase 3 landed: app-server Thread payloads expose optional thread.epiphanyState from live state or rollout reconstruction across start/resume/fork/read/unarchive/review-thread paths, giving clients typed reads without scraping prompt text.

Phase 4 retrieval/indexing landed: thread/epiphany/retrieve remains read-only; thread/epiphany/index writes Qdrant/Ollama-backed retrieval catalogs and manifests under codex_home, with exact/path plus BM25 fallback when needed.

Licensing/contributor policy settled: upstream Apache/third-party material keeps original licenses; project-authored material follows a PolyForm Noncommercial public path plus separate commercial licensing; contributors grant broad, sublicensable, relicensable rights to preserve that path.

epiphany-core extraction boundary verified: repo-owned prompt rendering, rollout replay, retrieval/indexing, distillation, proposal, and promotion policy live outside vendored Codex where practical; vendored Codex remains the thin typed host seam.

Algorithmic maps may use natural language and metaphor, but only after relevant source has been read and prose is anchored to concrete code references. Metaphor is compression after source grounding, not a substitute for understanding.

Phase 5 landed complete enough: thread/epiphany/update, distill, propose, promote, read projection, and stateUpdated provide explicit durable state mutation, read-only proposal/distillation, verifier-backed promotion, revision/changedFields metadata, client-visible projection, structural validation, and rejected-promotion silence.

Compact-Rehydrate-Reorient-Continue became an explicit architecture primitive: checkpoint before compaction when possible, rehydrate from canonical map/handoff/evidence rather than prompt residue, restate the persisted next action, and continue with one bounded move only when instructed.

Stack-overflow regression investigation produced a scar worth keeping: Windows app-server test threads needed repo-local RUST_MIN_STACK=67108864; boxed-future experiments did not fix the benchmark and were reverted immediately. Failed hypotheses are not souvenirs.

Anti-cruft regression rule persisted: one measured hypothesis at a time; if a regression or benchmark fix does not fix the target, revert it before trying the next hypothesis; stop when diff grows while understanding shrinks.

Persistent-state hygiene is part of the machine: map, handoff, plan, algorithmic map, scratch, and evidence each need one job; evidence is a distilled ledger, not an activity feed; tools/epiphany_prepare_compaction.py audits state before and after imminent-compaction passes.

Early Phase 6 reflection surfaces landed: read-only thread/epiphany/scene, jobs, and context expose compact scene, job/progress slots, and targeted graph/evidence/checkpoint shards without mutation, scheduling, notification, retrieval, proposal, or promotion.

Context-pressure telemetry and durable investigation checkpoints landed: thread/epiphany/pressure derives pressure from real token telemetry and auto-compact/context limits; investigationCheckpoint is authoritative typed state rendered into prompt, scene, and context. Both avoid automatic mutation or scheduling.

Freshness and watcher-backed invalidation reflection landed: thread/epiphany/freshness reports retrieval/graph staleness, dirty paths, watcher-observed changes, and mapped graph/frontier hits without mutation, scheduling, notification, or automatic semantic invalidation.

Capability growth doctrine settled: grow cognition ahead of authority, keep permissions explicit, make interruption sacred, stage capability release, treat misuse and paternal anti-human caretaker outcomes as design risks, and use FOSS/source-available/commercial licensing according to real economics and risk.

Bounded CRRC reorientation policy landed as read-only thread/epiphany/reorient. It consumes checkpoint, freshness, watcher, and pressure signals to return resume-versus-regather with explicit reasons, without mutation, compaction, scheduling, notification, or silent continuation.

Durable jobBindings became the thin Epiphany-owned launcher seam: jobs/jobsUpdated reflect launcher identity, authority scope, backend kind/job id, and live runtime agent_jobs progress; jobLaunch/jobInterrupt provide bounded explicit authority over that seam without turning jobs reflection into a scheduler.

Reorient runtime loop landed: reorientLaunch launches one fixed reorient-worker through the existing job-control seam; reorientResult reads completed worker output as reviewable findings; reorientAccept explicitly banks completed findings into observation/evidence plus optional scratch/checkpoint state without auto-promoting arbitrary output or continuing work.

MVP role and status surfaces landed: thread/epiphany/crrc, roles, roleLaunch, roleResult, and tools/epiphany_mvp_status.py expose implementation/modeling/verification/reorientation lanes, CRRC recommendation, fixed modeling/checkpoint and verification/review launches, and reviewable read-back without scheduling, mutation, or hidden acceptance.

Auditable dogfood and live-specialist loops proved the MVP path: tools/epiphany_mvp_dogfood.py exercised state, role launch/result, CRRC drift, reorient launch/result/accept, and status snapshots; tools/epiphany_mvp_live_specialist.py proved roleLaunch -> agent_jobs worker -> report_agent_job_result -> roleResult.

Fixed-lane coordinator landed: read-only thread/epiphany/coordinator composes roles, pressure, reorient, CRRC, role results, and reorient result into review-gated action recommendations; tools/epiphany_mvp_coordinator.py drives the same policy with auditable artifacts across cold start, modeling, verification, drift/reorient, and high-pressure paths.

Limited native CRRC automation landed only at safe turn-complete boundaries: it may auto-run coordinator-approved compactRehydrateReorient via Op::Compact or launchReorientWorker via the fixed reorient-worker binding, but may not auto-launch modeling/verification, accept findings, promote evidence, edit implementation code, or silently continue.

Pre-compaction checkpoint intervention landed: token-count pressure events for loaded Epiphany threads at shouldPrepareCompaction steer the active turn once with a bounded CRRC directive to bank checkpoint/scratch/map/evidence before compaction or reorientation, without direct mutation, broad launch, semantic acceptance, or hidden continuation.

Self-dogfood exposed an artifact-honesty blocker in tools/epiphany_mvp_dogfood.py: the manifest listed vanilla comparison artifacts that were not written. The runner now writes truthful vanilla-reference and comparison artifacts for skipped, failed, or completed reference runs.

Chose the MVP GUI path: a local Tauri v2 + React operator console over existing app-server status/coordinator/role/reorient/job/artifact surfaces. The GUI reflects and steers typed Epiphany state but does not become a source of truth.

GUI operator MVP now prepares durable checkpoint state, shows status/coordinator/job/role/artifact surfaces, and exposes bounded status/coordinator artifacts plus fixed modeling, verification, and reorient launch/read controls with review-gated reorient acceptance. Verified with py_compile, npm build, browser visual smoke, cargo fmt/check, Tauri debug build, and a live prepareCheckpoint -> readModelingResult bridge probe.

thread/epiphany/graphQuery landed as a read-only graph traversal surface: explicit node/edge lookup, path/symbol matching, edge-kind matching, bounded neighbor walks, and frontier neighborhoods over authoritative typed state, live-smoked without stateUpdated notifications or revision mutation.

Distilled prompt doctrine landed after rechecking global AGENTS, empty Codex memory surfaces, and nearby evidence ledgers: shared prompts now carry state/memory/source/anti-churn discipline; specialist templates split modeling/body, verification/soul, reorientation/life, and coordinator/Self. Verified with epiphany-core tests, codex-protocol tests, focused app-server template tests, role/reorient/status/coordinator smokes, and live-specialist artifacts.

Specialist prompt bodies were extracted from Rust into vendor/codex/codex-rs/app-server/src/prompts/epiphany_specialists.toml. app-server now parses the bundled TOML once and uses it for modeling/body, verification/soul, reorientation/life, and coordinator/Self text while keeping fixed-lane launch policy in Rust. Verified with app-server config/template tests, role/reorient/coordinator smokes, and live-specialist artifacts.

Modeling/checkpoint specialists now have a review-gated graph-growth path: their prompt/output contract can return a modeling-safe statePatch, thread/epiphany/roleResult projects it when valid, thread/epiphany/roleAccept applies completed modeling patches through the normal state validator with audit observation/evidence, and the GUI exposes Accept Modeling. Phase6 role smoke proved accepted modeling grew the durable graph before verification saw the expanded frontier.

Aetheria dogfood exposed a supervision-boundary failure: the supervising Codex session directly edited and committed target-repo slices instead of driving Epiphany GUI/coordinator/fixed lanes. Treat those commits as supervisor-seeded implementation, not clean Epiphany evidence; future dogfood must quarantine direct edits as explicit operator interventions or contamination.

Dogfood supervision now has a projection boundary: operator/status/coordinator/live-specialist/dogfood tools sanitize direct worker payloads by default, seal raw transcripts/stderr as forensic artifacts, and coordinator smoke asserts rawResult is sealed in operator-facing summaries. Durable instructions now forbid supervisor exposure to raw worker thoughts during normal dogfood.

Function/API telemetry now gives dogfood supervision a non-thought instrument panel: status, coordinator, GUI action, dogfood, and live-specialist tools emit agent-function-telemetry.json from sealed app-server transcripts with method counts, request shape, job/status/path metadata, and visible tool names while sealing text, raw results, turn items, and direct worker messages.

Aetheria supervised dogfood exposed a coordinator policy bug: after the modeling/checkpoint worker was interrupted and roleResult became backendUnavailable, coordinator skipped to verification. Fixed map_epiphany_coordinator so backendUnavailable is treated as a relaunchable role status for modeling and verification; focused Rust test and live coordinator plan now keep verification behind modeling.

Aetheria supervised dogfood tested CRRC through the GUI/coordinator lane: modeling and verification findings were accepted, CRRC compact/reorient/reorientAccept reached state revision 16, rollout replay now preserves out-of-band Epiphany snapshots on fresh resume, and the coordinator clears to continueImplementation after accepted resume reorientation despite stale cumulative pressure.

Aetheria supervised dogfood exposed the implementation-lane MVP blocker: four continueImplementation turns completed without any tracked Aetheria workspace diff. The latest audited run at .epiphany-dogfood/aetheria-supervised/gui-actions/continueImplementation-1777527640605829200-12724 records workspaceChanged=false and command telemetry shows only Get-Content reads, no write verbs.

Stateful no-diff implementation handling landed and was exercised on the Aetheria dogfood thread: continueImplementation-1777528376766401900-25000 produced no tracked diff, thread/epiphany/update marked the investigation checkpoint regather_required with audit evidence, advanced Epiphany state to revision 17, and a follow-up coordinator plan returned regatherManually with implementation blocked.

CRRC pre-compaction steering now creates a turn-scoped pending compact handoff after successful steer_input, and clean turn completion forces the existing compact automation even if the ordinary coordinator would continue; aborted turns clear the handoff. Focused Rust tests, coordinator smoke, and reorient-launch smoke passed.

CRRC pressure now uses current context usage from last token telemetry instead of cumulative thread token spend, treats cumulative-only telemetry as unknown, and starts pre-compaction preparation at 80% of the active auto-compact/context limit. Focused pressure/coordinator tests plus pressure and coordinator smokes passed.

Aetheria dogfood sanity review found the specialists were not the weak link: modeling emitted source-grounded graph/checkpoint/frontier state, and verification returned needs-evidence rather than blessing implementation. The coordinator policy was tightened so only an accepted verifier pass clears implementation; accepted non-pass verifier findings route back toward modeling/checkpoint repair or reorientation. Focused Rust coordinator tests, coordinator smoke, and an operator-safe replay now block implementation with regatherManually on the current Aetheria thread.

Aetheria dogfood attempt dogfood-20260430-094721 was contaminated by supervisor lane puppeteering: manual launchModeling, launchReorient, and launchVerification calls tested the buttons, not autonomous Epiphany coordination. The manual artifacts still showed useful facts: modeling and reorientation stayed source-grounded, verification returned needs-evidence, and implementation remained blocked.

Coordinator regather policy now keeps fixed lanes in charge: regatherManually no longer preempts modeling/verification review, completed unaccepted modeling findings produce reviewModelingResult before verification, modeling acceptance can be driven only by explicit test auto-review or operator review, and the current Aetheria coordinator replay now stops at reviewModelingResult instead of supervisor improvisation. Focused Rust coordinator tests and MVP coordinator smoke passed.

Aetheria supervised dogfood hardened the fixed-lane coordinator and GUI audit loop: stale active backend jobs now project terminal when progress is complete; accepted non-pass verifier findings no longer clear implementation; verifier coverage accepts modeler source evidence ids; no-diff implementation audits compare pre/post diff hashes and latest audit status; blocked implementation regather routes through CRRC; stale accepted reorient findings relaunch bounded reorientation; accepted reorientation banks a resume-ready checkpoint.

Aetheria dogfood exposed the next MVP product blocker: engine assumptions require editor/runtime integration. A worker launched legacy D:\Unity\Editor\Unity.exe (Unity 5.5.0f3) despite Aetheria pinning Unity 6000.1.10f1. The GUI action prompt now refuses PATH/default/legacy Unity when the exact pinned editor is unavailable, but the real next organ is a typed editor/runtime bridge that resolves pinned editors, runs explicit batch/probe commands, and captures artifacts as evidence.

First Unity editor/runtime bridge landed: tools/epiphany_unity_bridge.py resolves ProjectSettings-pinned Unity editors, refuses wrong or missing versions, owns batch/quit/projectPath execution, writes inspection/command/log artifacts, and is exposed through GUI Inspect Unity plus implementation prompt guidance. Smoke verified wrong-only roots are rejected, exact fake roots plan dry-run commands, and missing editors block runs; real Aetheria inspection shows pin 6000.1.10f1 while only 6000.4.2f1 is installed.

Documented the Rider+Unity environment integration plan in notes/epiphany-rider-unity-integration-plan.md. The plan defines Rider as IDE/source-context organ, Unity as editor/runtime fact organ, and Epiphany as durable coordinator/Self, with seams for a Rider tool window/context bridge, pinned Unity bridge operations, Aetheria-side Unity editor probes, GUI Environment panel, typed environment state, specialist behavior, and verification gates.

Documented the three-pronged development workflow: Rider is the human code view for repo state/source tree/diffs/diagnostics, Epiphany GUI is the agent dashboard for objectives, specialist lanes, logs/artifacts, persisted state, and graph/control-flow visualization, and Unity is the pinned runtime environment for tests, probes, scene configuration, assets, shaders, and play/edit-mode evidence. The adjacent EpiphanyGraph React viewer is now called out as the preferred seed for GUI graph diagramming because it consumes typed `graphs.architecture`, `graphs.dataflow`, and `graphs.links` directly.

Unity integration priority corrected: the CLI bridge is only the pinned transport; the first real Unity organ must be an Aetheria-side resident Editor package that inspects scenes, prefabs, serialized component fields, prefab overrides, materials, shaders, ScriptableObjects, asset GUIDs, and scene configuration through Unity APIs, then writes typed artifacts. Direct text parsing of `.unity` and `.prefab` files is not enough for meaningful hypothesis testing or safe refactoring; future mutation support must be narrow, previewed when feasible, explicitly reviewed, and artifact-backed.

Resident Unity editor bridge slice landed: Aetheria branch codex/epiphany-unity-editor-bridge contains Assets/Editor/Epiphany/EpiphanyEditorBridge.cs for editor-resident project, compilation, scene, prefab, serialized-object, reference-search probes; Epiphany Unity bridge now detects that package and plans named probe/test commands with auditable artifact receipts while still blocking runtime execution until the exact Unity 6000.1.10f1 editor is installed.

GUI Environment panel landed: apps/epiphany-gui now surfaces the latest Unity bridge runtime audit with project-pinned editor status, resident editor package presence, execute method, installed/candidate editor paths, search roots, and artifact bundle details; Rider remains an explicit pending environment lane until its bridge exists. Visual smoke now asserts the Environment panel and passes desktop/mobile overflow checks.

LunaMosaic thread 019ddb91-fcc8-7fb1-97ca-aec71bc713b3 exposed repetitive queue completion bias: a manual tile/image generation loop stopped at partial progress and rationalized conversational closure as a harness boundary. Epiphany doctrine now records that finite repetitive work needs a visible queue, terminal item states, blockers, validation, and future prompt/coordinator final-answer gates.

Pattern completion bias is now treated as the sharper LunaMosaic/Codex failure mode: agents may complete the recognizable shape of a successful turn instead of the stated task. Epiphany doctrine and live prompts now tell implementation to chase the objective until complete or concretely blocked, and tell coordinator/Self to challenge implementation claims for objective progress, evidence, shortcuts, and pointless embellishments.

Major Epiphany prompt surfaces were moved into prompt files: rendered state intro/doctrine now lives under epiphany-core/src/prompts, and the app-server prompt TOML now owns modeling, verification, GUI-launched implementation, reorientation, coordinator, and CRRC pre-compaction templates. Implementation remains the main coding lane rather than a roleLaunch specialist, but its continueImplementation prompt is now auditable in epiphany_specialists.toml.

Specialist prompt salience was strengthened: modeling is now the Body, implementation is the Hands/main coding actuator, verification is the Soul, reorientation is Life, and coordinator remains the read-only Self. The nervous-system role is treated as cross-cutting signal flow through coordinator, CRRC, pressure, telemetry, and environment bridges rather than as implementation.

Prompt surfaces now preserve Codex's useful operator discipline explicitly and add an anti-Greenspun research guardrail. Research is named as the Eyes of the machine in config-backed prompts, implementation must use or perform bounded research before bespoke versions of known systems, verification treats unexamined reinvention as a risk, and the coordinator note asks whether the Hands checked known work before inventing.

Planning substrate formalized in notes/epiphany-planning-substrate.md: conversation, captures/inbox, backlog, roadmap streams, Objective Drafts, and active objective adoption are distinct states. GitHub Issues import should land in captures first with source refs and metadata, not mutate active objectives or make GitHub the internal backlog model.

The planner/future-shape role is named Imagination. It may synthesize captures, backlog, roadmap streams, objective drafts, and unresolved planning questions alongside Eyes research, but its outputs remain planning artifacts until explicit human adoption turns a draft into the active objective.

The first planning substrate runtime slice landed: EpiphanyThreadState now carries typed captures, backlog items, roadmap streams, Objective Drafts, and GitHub source refs; planning validates through revision-gated updates, renders into prompts, exposes read-only thread/epiphany/planning with generated schema types, appears in scene actions, and is covered by tools/epiphany_phase6_planning_smoke.py.

The GUI planning operator slice landed: tools/epiphany_mvp_status.py now collects/render planning state, apps/epiphany-gui renders planning summaries/captures/backlog/roadmap/objective drafts with a selected draft control, and tools/epiphany_gui_action.py exposes adoptObjectiveDraft to explicitly update objective/subgoal/planning/scratch/checkpoint/evidence with patch/update artifacts. tools/epiphany_gui_planning_smoke.py proves draft adoption marks the draft adopted, source backlog active, and activeObjective updated.

The Imagination planning lane landed: ThreadEpiphanyRoleId now includes imagination, app-server fixed roleLaunch/roleResult/roleAccept supports the planning-synthesis-worker, roleAccept accepts only review-gated planning patches without objective adoption, status/GUI surfaces can launch/read/accept the lane, schemas include the new role id, and tools/epiphany_phase6_role_smoke.py proves Imagination acceptance grows planning state while modeling and verification still complete.
